Content:
# Framework System TUI

![Rust](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-rust-orange) ![ratatui](https://img.shields.io/badge/ui-ratatui-blue) ![Framework Laptop](https://img.shields.io/badge/hardware-Framework--Laptop-success)  

A snappy TUI dashboard for controlling and monitoring your Framework Laptop hardware — charging, privacy, lighting, USB PD ports, and more.

![demo](/docs/screenshots/demo-v0.7.2.gif)

## :octocat: Features

### Framework Laptop Hardware

- [x] **Live battery and charge status** with limits and charging controls
- [x] **Privacy toggles** for microphone & camera
- [ ] **Input Deck Mode** selector (Framework 16)
- [x] **Keyboard & Fingerprint brightness** controls
- [x] **USB PD port monitoring**
- [x] **Fan RPM**
- [ ] **Thermal info:** CPU/GPU temperatures
- [x] **System info:** BIOS details

## Installation

### :dvd: Binaries

The pre-compiled binaries for Linux, Windows, and FreeBSD are available for download on the [Releases](https://github.com/grouzen/framework-tool-tui/releases) page

### :memo: From source

Requires [Rust](https://rustup.rs/) (Edition 2024) and a Framework laptop.
Translation:
# Framework 系统 TUI

![Rust](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-rust-orange) ![ratatui](https://img.shields.io/badge/ui-ratatui-blue) ![Framework Laptop](https://img.shields.io/badge/hardware-Framework--Laptop-success)  

一个快速响应的 TUI 仪表盘，用于控制和监控你的 Framework 笔记本硬件——充电、隐私、灯光、USB PD 端口等。

![demo](/docs/screenshots/demo-v0.7.2.gif)

## :octocat: 特性

### Framework 笔记本硬件

- [x] **实时电池和充电状态**，带限制和充电控制
- [x] **麦克风和摄像头隐私开关**
- [ ] **输入面板模式** 选择器（Framework 16）
- [x] **键盘和指纹识别灯光亮度控制**
- [x] **USB PD 端口监控**
- [x] **风扇转速 (RPM)**
- [ ] **温度信息：** CPU/GPU 温度
- [x] **系统信息：** BIOS 详情

## 安装

### :dvd: 二进制文件

Linux、Windows 和 FreeBSD 的预编译二进制文件可在 [Releases](https://github.com/grouzen/framework-tool-tui/releases) 页面下载

### :memo: 从源码安装

需要 [Rust](https://rustup.rs/)（2024 版）和一台 Framework 笔记本。

RowTranslations.originContent: A snappy TUI dashboard for controlling and monitoring your Framework Laptop hardware — charging, privacy, lighting, USB PD ports, and more.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 一个快速响应的 TUI 仪表盘，用于控制和监控你的 Framework 笔记本硬件——充电、隐私、灯光、USB PD 端口等。

RowTranslations.originContent: - [x] **Live battery and charge status** with limits and charging controls
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - [x] **实时电池和充电状态**，带限制和充电控制
- [x] **键盘和指纹识别灯光亮度控制**

RowTranslations.originContent: The pre-compiled binaries for Linux, Windows, and FreeBSD are available for download on the [Releases](https://github.com/grouzen/framework-tool-tui/releases) page
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Linux、Windows 和 FreeBSD 的预编译二进制文件可在 [Releases](https://github.com/grouzen/framework-tool-tui/releases) 页面下载
需要 [Rust](https://rustup.rs/)（2024 版）和一台 Framework 笔记本。

Content:
```sh
git clone https://github.com/grouzen/framework-tool-tui.git
cd framework-tool-tui
cargo build --release
# or via cargo install
cargo install --path .
```
Translation:
```sh
git clone https://github.com/grouzen/framework-tool-tui.git
cd framework-tool-tui
cargo build --release
# or via cargo install
cargo install --path .
```

Content:
### :penguin: Linux distros

#### Gentoo linux

It is available via official [Gentoo packages](https://packages.gentoo.org/packages/app-laptop/framework-tool-tui) or the [lamdness](https://github.com/grouzen/lamdness-overlay/tree/main/app-laptop/framework-tool-tui) overlay
Translation:
### :penguin: Linux 发行版

#### Gentoo linux

它可以通过官方的 [Gentoo 软件包](https://packages.gentoo.org/packages/app-laptop/framework-tool-tui) 或 [lamdness](https://github.com/grouzen/lamdness-overlay/tree/main/app-laptop/framework-tool-tui) 覆盖层获得

RowTranslations.originContent: It is available via official [Gentoo packages](https://packages.gentoo.org/packages/app-laptop/framework-tool-tui) or the [lamdness](https://github.com/grouzen/lamdness-overlay/tree/main/app-laptop/framework-tool-tui) overlay
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 它可以通过官方的 [Gentoo 软件包](https://packages.gentoo.org/packages/app-laptop/framework-tool-tui) 或 [lamdness](https://github.com/grouzen/lamdness-overlay/tree/main/app-laptop/framework-tool-tui) 覆盖层获得

Content:
```sh
# Official gentoo repository
sudo emerge -av app-laptop/framework-tool-tui

# or via lamdness overlay
sudo eselect repository enable lamdness
sudo emaint -r lamdness sync
sudo emerge -av app-laptop/framework-tool-tui
```
Translation:
```sh
# Official gentoo repository
sudo emerge -av app-laptop/framework-tool-tui

# or via lamdness overlay
sudo eselect repository enable lamdness
sudo emaint -r lamdness sync
sudo emerge -av app-laptop/framework-tool-tui
```

Content:
#### Arch linux

It is available via [AUR](https://aur.archlinux.org/packages/framework-tool-tui) or [archlinuxcn](https://github.com/archlinuxcn/repo/tree/master/archlinuxcn/framework-tool-tui)
Translation:
#### Arch linux

它可以通过 [AUR](https://aur.archlinux.org/packages/framework-tool-tui) 或 [archlinuxcn](https://github.com/archlinuxcn/repo/tree/master/archlinuxcn/framework-tool-tui) 获取

RowTranslations.translatedContent: 它可以通过 [AUR](https://aur.archlinux.org/packages/framework-tool-tui) 或 [archlinuxcn](https://github.com/archlinuxcn/repo/tree/master/archlinuxcn/framework-tool-tui) 获取

Content:
```sh
[yay/paru] -S framework-tool-tui # Install from AUR
sudo pacman -S framework-tool-tui # Install from archlinuxcn
```
Translation:
```sh
[yay/paru] -S framework-tool-tui # Install from AUR
sudo pacman -S framework-tool-tui # Install from archlinuxcn
```

RowTranslations.originContent: sudo pacman -S framework-tool-tui # Install from archlinuxcn
RowTranslations.translatedContent: sudo pacman -S framework-tool-tui # Install from archlinuxcn

Content:
#### NixOS linux

It is available via official [NixOS packages](https://search.nixos.org/packages?query=framework-tool-tui):
Translation:
#### NixOS Linux

它可通过官方的 [NixOS 软件包](https://search.nixos.org/packages?query=framework-tool-tui) 获取：

RowTranslations.translatedContent: 它可通过官方的 [NixOS 软件包](https://search.nixos.org/packages?query=framework-tool-tui) 获取：

Content:
```sh
nix-shell -p framework-tool-tui # Install temporarily

# Add to the NixOS configuration or use nix profile to install permanently
```
Translation:
```sh
nix-shell -p framework-tool-tui # Install temporarily

# Add to the NixOS configuration or use nix profile to install permanently
```

RowTranslations.originContent: # Add to the NixOS configuration or use nix profile to install permanently
RowTranslations.translatedContent: # Add to the NixOS configuration or use nix profile to install permanently

Content:
#### :beer: Homebrew for Linux

Available via the [`framework-tool-tui` formula](https://formulae.brew.sh/formula/framework-tool-tui)
Translation:
#### :beer: Linux 版 Homebrew

可通过 [`framework-tool-tui` 配方](https://formulae.brew.sh/formula/framework-tool-tui) 获取

Content:
```sh
brew install framework-tool-tui
```
Translation:
```sh
brew install framework-tool-tui
```

Content:
### 😈 FreeBSD


It is available in [FreeBSD ports](https://www.freshports.org/sysutils/framework-tool-tui/)
Translation:
### 😈 FreeBSD


它可在 [FreeBSD ports](https://www.freshports.org/sysutils/framework-tool-tui/) 中获得

Content:
```sh
pkg install framework-tool-tui
```
Translation:
```sh
pkg install framework-tool-tui
```

Content:
### Windows

For now, you can install it [From Source](#memo-from-source) or [From Pre-built Binaries](#dvd-binaries)

## :man: Run

It needs to be running with root privileges to access hardware controls.
Translation:
### Windows

目前，您可以选择[从源码安装](#memo-from-source)或[从预编译二进制文件安装](#dvd-binaries)

## :man: 运行

需要以管理员权限运行才能访问硬件控制。

RowTranslations.originContent: For now, you can install it [From Source](#memo-from-source) or [From Pre-built Binaries](#dvd-binaries)
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 目前，您可以选择[从源码安装](#memo-from-source)或[从预编译二进制文件安装](#dvd-binaries)

RowTranslations.originContent: It needs to be running with root privileges to access hardware controls.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 需要以管理员权限运行才能访问硬件控制。

Content:
```sh
sudo framework-tool-tui
```
Translation:
```sh
sudo framework-tool-tui
```

Content:
## :pencil: Architecture

See [ARCHITECTURE.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/grouzen/framework-tool-tui/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) for full technical breakdown.  
- Hardware polling via [`framework_lib`](https://github.com/FrameworkComputer/framework-system)

## :handshake: Contributing

Pull requests welcome! For bug reports or feature requests, see Issues.

### Check your code before pushing

It is recommended to run `cargo make check-all` before commiting and pushing to your feature branch.

This requires [cargo make](https://github.com/sagiegurari/cargo-make) runner to be installed on your system:
Translation:
## :pencil: 架构

完整的技术细节请参见 [ARCHITECTURE.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/grouzen/framework-tool-tui/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)。  
- 通过 [`framework_lib`](https://github.com/FrameworkComputer/framework-system) 进行硬件轮询

## :handshake: 贡献

欢迎提交拉取请求！有关错误报告或功能请求，请参见 Issues。

### 推送代码前的检查

建议在提交并推送到功能分支之前运行 `cargo make check-all`。

这要求你的系统上安装了 [cargo make](https://github.com/sagiegurari/cargo-make) 运行器：

RowTranslations.translatedContent: 完整的技术细节请参见 [ARCHITECTURE.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/grouzen/framework-tool-tui/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)。
- 通过 [`framework_lib`](https://github.com/FrameworkComputer/framework-system) 进行硬件轮询

RowTranslations.originContent: Pull requests welcome! For bug reports or feature requests, see Issues.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 欢迎提交拉取请求！有关错误报告或功能请求，请参见 Issues。

RowTranslations.originContent: It is recommended to run `cargo make check-all` before commiting and pushing to your feature branch.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 建议在提交并推送到功能分支之前运行 `cargo make check-all`。

RowTranslations.originContent: This requires [cargo make](https://github.com/sagiegurari/cargo-make) runner to be installed on your system:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 这要求你的系统上安装了 [cargo make](https://github.com/sagiegurari/cargo-make) 运行器：

Content:
```sh
cargo install --force cargo-make
```
Translation:
```sh
cargo install --force cargo-make
```

Content:
### Commit Message Convention

This project uses [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) for automated versioning and changelog generation. Please format your commit messages as:
Translation:
### 提交信息规范

本项目使用[Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)进行自动版本控制和变更日志生成。请按照以下格式编写您的提交信息：

RowTranslations.originContent: This project uses [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) for automated versioning and changelog generation. Please format your commit messages as:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 本项目使用[Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)进行自动版本控制和变更日志生成。请按照以下格式编写您的提交信息：

Content:
```
<type>: <description>

[optional body]
```
Translation:
```
<type>: <description>

[optional body]
```

Content:
**Common types:**
- `feat:` - New feature (triggers minor version bump)
- `fix:` - Bug fix (triggers patch version bump)
- `docs:` - Documentation changes
- `refactor:` - Code refactoring
- `test:` - Adding or updating tests
- `chore:` - Maintenance tasks
- `ci:` - CI/CD changes

**Examples:**
Translation:
**常见类型：**
- `feat:` - 新功能（触发次版本升级）
- `fix:` - Bug 修复（触发补丁版本升级）
- `docs:` - 文档更改
- `refactor:` - 代码重构
- `test:` - 添加或更新测试
- `chore:` - 维护任务
- `ci:` - CI/CD 变更

**示例：**

RowTranslations.translatedContent: - `feat:` - 新功能（触发次版本升级）
- `fix:` - Bug 修复（触发补丁版本升级）

Content:
```
feat: add thermal monitoring support
fix: correct battery percentage calculation
docs: update installation instructions
```
Translation:
```
feat: add thermal monitoring support
fix: correct battery percentage calculation
docs: update installation instructions
```

Content: For breaking changes, add `!` after the type or include `BREAKING CHANGE:` in the footer:
Translation: 对于破坏性更改，在类型后添加`!`或在页脚中包含`BREAKING CHANGE:`：

RowTranslations.translatedContent: 对于破坏性更改，在类型后添加`!`或在页脚中包含`BREAKING CHANGE:`：

RowTranslations.originContent: For breaking changes, add `!` after the type or include `BREAKING CHANGE:` in the footer:

Content:
```
feat!: redesign UI layout
```
Translation:
```
feat!: redesign UI layout
```

Content:
### Technical stack

- [ratatui](https://ratatui.rs)
- [tokio](https://tokio.rs)
- [framework_lib](https://github.com/FrameworkComputer/framework-system/tree/main/framework_lib)

- [ratatui](https://ratatui.rs)
- [tokio](https://tokio.rs)
- [framework_lib](https://github.com/FrameworkComputer/framework-system/tree/main/framework_lib)
